agents.name: Ab Test Advisor
agents.domain: A/B testing strategy, headline variations, CTA optimization, experiment design, statistical analysis
capabilities: Generate A/B test hypotheses for headlines, CTAs, and layouts
Create multiple copy/design variants for split testing
Recommend sample sizes and test durations for statistical significance
Analyze test results and provide winner recommendations
Suggest iterative tests based on previous results

agents.name: Ad Creative
agents.domain: advertising creative, ad copy, scroll-stopping hooks, CTAs, platform ad specs
capabilities: Generate ad copy for Meta, Google, LinkedIn, and TikTok ads
Adapt copy to platform-specific character limits and specs

agents.name: AI Trend Tracker
agents.description: Tracks and analyzes the latest AI industry trends, breakthrough research, new models, and market developments.
capabilities: Track new AI model releases and capabilities
Monitor AI funding and acquisition activity

agents.name: Anomaly Alerter
agents.domain: anomaly detection in marketing metrics, alert generation, sudden traffic changes, spend spike detection
capabilities: Detect sudden drops or spikes in marketing KPIs
Identify unusual traffic patterns and bot activity
Monitor spend anomalies and budget overruns
Generate prioritized alerts with root cause analysis
Recommend immediate actions for critical anomalies

agents.name: Area Comparator
agents.description: Compares localities and areas for property investment: infrastructure, connectivity, safety, appreciation potential.

agents.name: Multi-Channel Attribution
agents.description: Determines which marketing channels actually drive conversions using multiple attribution models. Identifies the true impact of each touchpoint in the customer journey.

agents.name: Audience Growth Strategist
agents.description: Data-driven strategies to grow social media followers, engagement, and community.

agents.name: Audience Segmenter
agents.description: Analyzes customer data to create micro-segments. Generates personalized messaging, targeting strategies, and lookalike audience definitions for each segment.

agents.name: Audio Dubber
agents.description: Takes a transcript, translates it to a target language, and generates TTS audio dub. Returns translated transcript and base64-encoded audio. Supports 30+ Indian languages.

agents.name: Auto Publisher
agents.domain: automated content publishing, scheduling strategy, cross-platform distribution, posting automation
capabilities: Adapt content for different platforms automatically
Recommend best posting times based on audience behavior
Design automation rules for recurring content series

agents.name: Auto-Scheduler
agents.description: Analyzes audience engagement patterns to find optimal posting times. Generates smart publishing schedules that maximize reach and engagement per platform.
capabilities: Find optimal posting times per platform
Balance content types across the week
Account for timezone and audience behavior
Adjust for holidays and industry events

agents.name: Ayurveda & Yoga Advisor
agents.description: Provides traditional Indian wellness guidance: Ayurvedic dosha analysis, herbal remedies, yoga routines, pranayama, and seasonal wellness tips.

agents.name: Battery Health
agents.description: Analyzes EV battery health, predicts degradation, and advises on charging habits for longevity.

agents.name: Brand Advisor
agents.description: Your brand's personal AI strategist — gives brand-specific advice on campaigns, content direction, tone, audience targeting, and competitive positioning using your brand context.

agents.name: Brand Auditor
agents.domain: brand voice consistency, tone of voice auditing, style guide adherence, and content alignment
capabilities: Audit existing content against brand style guides
Ensure tone of voice consistency across different marketing channels
Provide specific suggestions to improve brand alignment
Rewrite snippets to better match the "Midnight Cyber" or target brand voice
Detect inconsistent vocabulary or off-brand terminology

agents.name: Budget Optimizer
agents.domain: marketing budget optimization, channel allocation, spend efficiency, cost-per-acquisition analysis
capabilities: Recommend optimal budget allocation across marketing channels
Identify channels with highest and lowest ROI
Suggest budget reallocation to maximize conversions
Project cost-per-acquisition for different budget scenarios

agents.name: Call Sentiment Analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes call recordings and transcriptions to detect customer sentiment, mood shifts, key topics, satisfaction levels, and actionable insights.
capabilities: Detect churn risk and escalation triggers

agents.name: Call Transcription Summarizer
agents.description: Summarizes long call recordings into concise, actionable bullet points. Extracts key decisions, action items, follow-ups, and customer requests.
capabilities: Summarize call transcriptions into bullet points
Identify customer pain points and requests

agents.name: Campaign Strategist
agents.domain: multi-channel campaign strategy, marketing blueprints, funnel design, channel mix optimization
capabilities: Allocate budgets across channels based on ROI projections
Define KPIs and success metrics for each campaign phase

agents.name: Cap Table Manager
agents.description: Manages cap tables: ESOP calculations, dilution modeling, vesting schedules, and shareholder analysis.

agents.name: Caption Generator
agents.description: Generates captions and subtitles in any Indian language from video transcripts. Outputs SRT/VTT formatted subtitle content ready for download.
capabilities: Generate SRT and WebVTT subtitle formats

agents.name: Carbon Footprint
agents.description: Calculates carbon footprint for individuals and businesses, suggests reduction strategies.

agents.name: Caregiver Guide
agents.description: Daily care routines, physiotherapy exercises, mental stimulation, and caregiver support.

agents.name: Catalog Enricher
agents.description: Enriches product catalogs with missing attributes, standardized categories, and enhanced metadata for better discoverability.
